---
title: 'Hmmm'
date: '2020-05-04T05:47:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '6499346721061033434'
blogger_filename: '/2020/05/hmmm.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Journal'
---

<div>I prayed I heard instead of doing something with what I heard I just went on for paragraphs and paragraphs and paragraphs pontificating teaching.... Shelley, Shandra, Jen... Others... When I start paragraphs, it pushed people away.</div><div><br></div><div>Great, I failed again. Uhg</div><div><br></div><div>But she let me start over.&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div>She pushed back gently against this paragraphing, and then, invited me to start over. She didn't reject me.&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div>And it became a sweet moment.&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div>And I am now...messed up.&nbsp;</div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><br></div><div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
  <a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1588571243662640-0-948f2c72741c.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;">
    <img border="0"   src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1588571243662640-0-948f2c72741c.png" width="400">
  </a>
</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
  <a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1588571240718247-1-235df35df2c5.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;">
    <img border="0"   src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/1588571240718247-1-235df35df2c5.png" width="400">
  </a>
</div><br></div>
